title: VERTICALITY-CHECK output — valid vertical slices and rejected horizontal ones

slices_ref.description: Path to 02-slices.json this check is based on.

verdict.description: all_vertical iff rejected[] empty; horizontal_found otherwise. Deterministic — never set by feel.

valid.description: Slices that passed verticality check — each has at least one black-box user-observable AC.

id.description: Slice S* identifier carried verbatim from candidate slices.

name.description: Slice name carried verbatim from candidate slices.

qualifying_acceptance.description: Non-empty subset of slice's acceptance that passed black-box + user-observable test.

reason.description: One line: which AC is black-box + user-observable, and what a client watches pass.

rejected.description: Slices that failed verticality check — no AC is black-box + user-observable.

qualifying_acceptance.description: Always empty in rejected[] — no AC qualified.

items.description: AC* id of a qualifying acceptance criterion (never present in rejected[]).

category.description: Rejection reason category: horizontal_cut, no_acceptance, or unresolved_acceptance.

reason.description: Why no AC is black-box + user-observable — names each AC and why it fails.

remedy.description: Recommended fix: re-cut into vertical capabilities, or merge into a vertical neighbour.

remedy_detail.description: Specific re-cut targets or named vertical neighbour to merge into.

slice_counts.description: Count totals: total == slices.length; valid + rejected == total.

valid.description: Count of slices that passed verticality check.

rejected.description: Count of slices rejected as horizontal.
